TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Broncho Billy Anderson kawas tay 1880, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 3, Broncho Billy Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1971) qnxan nya Anderson htagan beh sa Maxwell Henry Aronson. hiya sswe kneril Leona Anderson ga squilq psibay ru ppqwas. qutux ngasal nya ga Jewish ramu. hiya ga yutas ru yaki aring Prussia musa Amelika, yaya aring Russian Empire musa Amelika. Anderson cyugal kawas lga, qutux ngasal musa Arkansas, Pine Bluff. tehok spat kawas lga, cingasal musa Louis, Missouri. mopuw spat kawas lga, hiya ga musa New York. 1903 kawas lga, Anderson mstnaq ta Edwin S. Porter, śďĒšĽĽ squilq psibay. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ő≤ron ¶~ ®ńßo ő≤illj an*ers~…ēon kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ő≤ron ¶~ ®ńßo ő≤illj an*ers~…ēon, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. (wal mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) qnxan nja an*ers~…ēon ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa maxwell ńßenrj arons~…ēon. ńßija s~…ēs~…ēwe kneril leona an*ers~…ēon …£a s~…ēquilq ps~…ēiő≤aj ru ppqwas~…ē. qutux Ňčas~…ēal nja …£a *ewis~…ēńß ramu. ńßija …£a jutas~…ē ru jaki ariŇč prus~…ēs~…ēia mus~…ēa amelika, jaja ariŇč rus~…ēs~…ēian empire mus~…ēa amelika. an*ers~…ēon ¶~ ®ju…£al kawas~…ē l…£a, qutux Ňčas~…ēal mus~…ēa arkans~…ēas~…ē, pine ő≤lu**. teńßok s~…ēpat kawas~…ē l…£a, ¶~ ®iŇčas~…ēal mus~…ēa louis~…ē, mis~…ēs~…ēouri. mopuw s~…ēpat kawas~…ē l…£a, ńßija …£a mus~…ēa new jork. **** kawas~…ē l…£a, an*ers~…ēon ms~…ētnaq ta e*win s~…ē. porter, ** s~…ēquilq ps~…ēiő≤aj. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: Broncho Billy Anderson kawas tay 1880, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 3, Broncho Billy Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1971) qnxan nya Anderson htagan beh sa Maxwell Henry Aronson. hiya sswe kneril Leona Anderson ga squilq psibay ru ppqwas. qutux ngasal nya ga Jewish ramu. hiya ga yutas ru yaki aring Prussia musa Amelika, yaya aring Russian Empire musa Amelika. Anderson cyugal kawas lga, qutux ngasal musa Arkansas, Pine Bluff. tehok spat kawas lga, cingasal musa Louis, Missouri. mopuw spat kawas lga, hiya ga musa New York. 1903 kawas lga, Anderson mstnaq ta Edwin S. Porter, śďĒšĽĽ squilq psibay. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
